vehicles.restorationFocus: NA four-banger, vacuum lines, basic suspension. The tutorial car.
vehicles.loreBlurb: The lightweight Corolla that became a drift legend. Takumi's chariot, the mountain king's weapon of choice.

vehicles.restorationFocus: Rust everywhere. Bodywork-heavy — engine is fine.
vehicles.loreBlurb: Honda's featherweight pocket rocket. They all rust, but the ones that survive are worth saving.

vehicles.restorationFocus: V6 vacuum spaghetti, T-top seals, wiring gremlins. Diagnosis-heavy.
vehicles.loreBlurb: The Z that time forgot. Overshadowed by its twin-turbo successor, the Z31 hides a surprisingly capable chassis under all those vacuum lines.

vehicles.restorationFocus: Mid-engine access nightmare. Wrench work difficulty from layout.
vehicles.loreBlurb: Toyota's mid-engine experiment. Same 4A-GE as the AE86 but crammed behind the seats. Bring short arms and patience.

vehicles.restorationFocus: Drift tax damage. Undoing bad mods, mystery wiring, clapped interior.
vehicles.loreBlurb: Every drift missile started as someone's clean S13. Yours has zip ties where bolts should be and a wiring harness held together by hope.

vehicles.restorationFocus: First rotary. Port cleanup, coolant seal inspection, single turbo rebuild.
vehicles.loreBlurb: Your introduction to the spinning Dorito. The FC taught a generation that rotaries are worth the trouble — most of the time.

vehicles.restorationFocus: DSM reliability — cracked manifold, transfer case, AWD turbo platform.
vehicles.loreBlurb: The DSM that could embarrass anything on the street — when it ran. Cracked exhaust manifolds and transfer case whine are just part of the experience.

vehicles.restorationFocus: High-rev NA. Valve adjustment, VTEC solenoid, LSD rebuild. Precision-heavy.
vehicles.loreBlurb: Honda's masterpiece of naturally aspirated engineering. The B18C5 screams to 8400 RPM and rewards every fraction of precision you give it.

vehicles.restorationFocus: Sequential twin-turbo, apex seals, vacuum labyrinth. All four mechanics maxed.
vehicles.loreBlurb: The rotary's final form. 80+ vacuum lines, sequential twin turbos, and apex seals that haunt your dreams. If you can finish this, you can finish anything.

vehicles.restorationFocus: Ringland failure, boxer access, turbo system, DCCD AWD.
vehicles.loreBlurb: The rally-bred boxer that loves to crack ringlands. Horizontally opposed means everything is sideways, including your patience.

vehicles.restorationFocus: Inline-six royalty. Sequential TT, head gasket, Getrag V160 rebuild.
vehicles.loreBlurb: The 2JZ needs no introduction. Toyota overbuilt this engine so hard that thirty years later people are still finding its limits.

vehicles.restorationFocus: ATTESA E-TS AWD, ITBs x6, twin ceramic turbos. The endgame car.
vehicles.loreBlurb: Godzilla. Six individual throttle bodies, twin ceramic turbos, and an AWD system that thinks faster than you do. The final boss.
